mechanism: same-name expert tensors are semantically permuted
interpretation: Most of the toy MoE failure is recovered by matching expert output behavior before averaging.

mechanism: expert weights and router dispatch must be co-calibrated
interpretation: A frozen router is safer than naive router averaging, but held-out router calibration adds measurable soft accuracy.

mechanism: expert source weights should explain routed output residuals, not only parameter deltas
interpretation: Output-space projection gives the best soft-router score, but it is less robust under hard sparse dispatch.

mechanism: projection is reliable for some experts and over-moves others
interpretation: Confidence blending trades a small soft loss for better hard top-2 sparse accuracy.

mechanism: top-k capacity overflow is a separate failure mode from task loss
interpretation: Bias-only capacity correction sharply reduces overflow but costs some accuracy; keep it as a capacity gate.
